g.text: PaiSmart architecture • Isometric concept • Upload → Async pipeline → Hybrid retrieval → Streaming answer
merged files • chunk objects • parsed text cache
buffering • retry • decouple upload from heavy processing
ES 混合检索与向量数据库
knowledge_base index • semantic recall • keyword fallback
chat history • upload bitmap • embedding cache
WebSocket realtime delivery • DeepSeek stream completion
chunk stream • completion state • interactive chat
Go / Gin service • query embedding • hybrid search • prompt assembly
Left: Multi-format enterprise documents land in MinIO after chunk upload, MD5 verification and merge
Actual project flow: Upload API → chunk_info / Redis bitmap → MinIO merged object → Kafka trigger
Center: Kafka decouples parse, chunk, embedding and index into a recoverable async pipeline
Actual project flow: Tika Parse → Chunk Split → Embedding API → Elasticsearch knowledge_base
Right: WebSocket delivers DeepSeek stream responses built from ES hybrid retrieval context
Actual project flow: SearchService HybridSearch → ChatService StreamResponse → frontend realtime UI
